name: Super Fiesta: Adrina & DJ Jovani (LT)
description:
On September 25th, Oslo is getting ready for a real SUPER FIESTA! 

For the very first time in Norway, ADRINA and DJ JOVANI will share the same stage for one unforgettable night!!!

Adrina has never performed in Norway before, making this a very special chance to experience one of Lithuania’s hottest artists live in Oslo.
DJ Jovani is also finally returning to Norway after a very long time away, and he’s bringing all the biggest hits and incredible energy with him!

Get ready for amazing music, dancing, and an atmosphere you won’t forget! 

Vulkan Arena, Oslo Norway
September 25th

This is shaping up to be one of the hottest Lithuanian parties of the year in Norway!
